mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.`name`, a.login_name, a.per_code, a.depname, a.user_type, ad.label AS 'user_types', a.login_flag, a.menu_role, a.modu_role, a.butt_role, a.data_role, a.remarks, b.`butt_role_id`, c.`data_id`, d.`menu_role_id`, e.`modu_role_id`, DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS 'createTime' FROM `sys_user` a LEFT JOIN `sys_dict` ad ON ad.value = a.user_type AND ad.type = 'user_type' AND ad.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN `sys_user_butt` b ON b.`user_id` = a.`id` LEFT JOIN `sys_user_data` c ON c.`user_id` = a.`id` LEFT JOIN `sys_user_menu` d ON d.`user_id` = a.`id` LEFT JOIN `sys_user_modu` e ON e.`user_id` = a.`id` WHERE a.`id` = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.`name`, a.login_name AS 'loginname', a.per_code AS 'percode', a.depname, a.user_type AS 'userType', ad.label AS 'userTypes', a.login_flag AS 'loginflag', DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS 'createTime' FROM `sys_user` a LEFT JOIN `sys_dict` ad ON ad.value = a.user_type AND ad.type = 'user_type' AND ad.del_flag = 0 WHERE a.del_flag = 0
AND a.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND a.login_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{loginname}, '%')
AND a.per_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{percode}, '%')
AND a.depname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{depname}, '%')
AND a.login_flag = #{loginflag}
AND a.user_type = #{userType}
ORDER BY a.update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `sys_user`( id, `name`, login_name, pass_word, per_code, depname, user_type, login_flag, menu_role, modu_role, butt_role, data_role, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, remarks ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{loginname}, #{password}, #{percode}, #{depname}, #{userType}, #{loginflag}, #{menurole}, #{modurole}, #{buttrole}, #{datarole}, #{createUser}, NOW(), #{createUser}, NOW(), #{remarks} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `sys_user` SET del_flag = 1, update_user = #{createUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, `name`, login_name AS 'loginname', pass_word AS 'password', create_time AS 'createTime', login_ip AS 'loginip', login_date AS 'logindate', login_flag AS 'loginflag', passw_time AS 'passwTime', error_time AS 'errorTime', error_count AS 'errorCount', remarks FROM `sys_user` WHERE del_flag = 0 AND login_name = #{loginname} LIMIT 1
